notes: A WaveST-Gate release DOI is recorded in explicit published Zenodo deposition fields.

records.detail: Counts, proportions, QC, splits, manifest, and protocol are required.
QC includes cell coverage, entropy, dominant cell type, and GT coverage flag.
Release bundle, upload manifest, Zenodo metadata, and deposition instructions are prepared.
Release verifier checked tar readability, upload manifest members, critical artifacts, and dry-run bundle consistency.
records.metric: overall_status=passed; bundle_integrity_status=passed; doi_status=published; tar_member_count=617; critical_artifacts_checked=73; num_failures=0

records.detail: Environment report records Python, package versions, PyTorch/CUDA/GPU, R packages, and baseline environment status.
A WaveST-Gate release DOI was found in explicit published Zenodo deposition fields.
Datasheet records artifact inventory, QC summary, split summary, cell-type totals, data dictionary, and machine-checkable integrity checks for the Xenium-to-Visium benchmark.
Machine-readable audit maps every Nature-level goal requirement to evidence files and failed checks, with the project DOI kept as an explicit external action.
Generated Data availability, Code availability, Reproducibility, and Computing environment statements are evidence-linked and keep the project release DOI separate from upstream dataset DOIs.

records.requirement: manuscript methods and statistical analysis draft
records.detail: Generated Methods/Supplementary Methods draft links benchmark construction, model specification, training losses, baseline fairness, ablations, reliability, boundary, niche, external generalization, robustness, statistics, compute, and reproducibility evidence.
Reviewer-facing dossier links headline claims, likely reviewer concerns, preemptive responses, stage status, and evidence paths.

records.requirement: checkpoint, predictions, reliability maps, and training curve
records.detail: Main real-data run must provide model state, proportions, expression reconstruction, gates, uncertainty, attention, maps, and training history.
Figure-level assets should exist for workflow, spatial composition, baselines, reliability, boundary/niche/pathology, and pass nonblank validation.

records.requirement: manuscript figure legends and claim evidence
records.detail: Generated Figure 1-5 and Supplementary Figure S1 legends link each visual to key claims, values, and evidence files.

records.requirement: formal baseline table with shared genes/reference/supervised spots
records.detail: Completed formal baselines: WaveST-Gate, BayesPrism, RCTD (multi), SpatialDWLS/Seurat, CARD, reference_cosine, reference_nnls, SpatialDWLS, Tangram (rna_count_based, 1000 epochs), cell2location, Tangram (uniform, 1000 epochs), uniform, SPOTlight
Comparison table should include runtime, memory, and paired per-spot significance columns.
Split-wise and paired bootstrap mean/std statistics are required for the current matched benchmark.
Full Giotto runDWLSDeconv package-stack rerun produced predictions, metrics, and manifests.

records.requirement: independent matched-GT multi-sample mean and standard deviation
records.detail: Independent matched-GT datasets should be aggregated for formal mean/std baseline reporting.
records.metric: num_datasets=2; num_methods=12; complete_methods=9; jsd_mean=0.136431; jsd_std=0.174661; num_datasets=2

records.detail: Required ablations are present.

records.requirement: uncertainty calibration and modality reliability evidence
records.detail: Uncertainty-error correlation, risk coverage, calibration, gate maps, and failure cases are required.

records.requirement: typed boundary sharpness and marker validation
records.detail: Tumor-stroma, ductal, immune-edge, marker validation, H&E overlay, and no-boundary comparison artifacts are required.
External Wu/Swarbrick pathology classifications are compared with no-retuning predicted tumor/immune/stromal composition.
Niche composition, marker enrichment, gate-by-niche, agent attention-by-niche, and maps are required.
Predicted niches should be checked against local Xenium tumor/immune/stromal neighborhood composition.
External predicted niches are cross-tabulated against public pathology classification labels.
External no-retuning predictions must include per-dataset proportions, gates, uncertainty, attention, metrics, and manifests.
Rep1 Xenium pseudo-spots provide external no-retuning matched cell-type ground truth metrics and simple-baseline comparison.
Rep2 checkpoint is minimally retuned on Rep1 train/val pseudo-spots and evaluated on held-out Rep1 test spots against formal baselines.
records.metric: jsd=0.0385261; spotwise_cosine=0.960481; mean_celltype_pearson=0.670521; num_train_spots=975; num_eval_spots=171; top_method=WaveST-Gate; jsd=0.0385261

records.requirement: Rep1 no-retuning and minimal-retuning budget curve
records.detail: Rep1 direct transfer is reported as a domain-shift case, and a held-out minimal-retuning budget curve quantifies the adaptation needed to beat the best baseline.
records.metric: jsd=0.365606; best_baseline_jsd=0.178227; beats_best_baseline=False; budget_steps=25; jsd=0.125886; jsd_margin_vs_best_baseline=0.0523413

records.detail: Core robustness should include gene dropout, gene panels, cell-type removal, prototype perturbation, H&E perturbations, low-expression/low-cell-count subgroups, different splits, and patch sizes.
records.metric: n_rows=42; removed_celltypes=19; prototype_rows=4; split_rows=5; missing_panels=[]; patch_sizes=128,256,32,64

records.requirement: GT-stratified split sensitivity and benchmark-radius confidence controls
records.detail: Supplementary GT-stratified splits address the zero-GT validation split, while radius/cell-count sensitivity checks Xenium-to-Visium benchmark-label confidence.
